summary: Evening cycle. Merged docs sync #1187 (ARCHITECTURE.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, ROADMAP.md drift fixed). Closed stale #1184 (superseded), #1151 (old EM report with failing CI), and resolved dogfood issue #1181 (report_intent fixed by PR #1178). P0 swarm health persists: 85.7% agents stuck (#1186, continuing from #1128) — requires human intervention. P1 chicken-and-egg identity bridge (#1182) remains open. KE-2 stalling (#917). agentguard-cloud 4 versions behind.

agentguardCloud.notes: PR #492 (telemetry CLI auth tests) open, #491/#488/#487/#483 are DRAFT. PR #490 (github.* allow rules) merged — fixes dogfood issue #1177 in cloud context.

agentguardAnalytics.notes: No open PRs. CI: no recent runs.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: report_intent and Copilot CLI meta-tools blocked as unknown
dogfoodPatterns.description: report_intent, list_bash, read_bash, stop_bash, write_bash were classified as unknown action type → default-deny.
dogfoodPatterns.fix: PR #1178 merged — 5 tools now mapped in tool-action-map.json (46 total)

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: github.pr.* / github.issue.* actions missing from policy — pr-merger blocked
dogfoodPatterns.description: agentguard-cloud default policy was missing github.* allow rules, blocking pr-merger entirely. agent-guard agentguard.yaml already had the rules.
dogfoodPatterns.note: agent-guard agentguard.yaml has github.* rules at lines 159-176; no fix needed there

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Agent identity bridge blocked by no-governance-self-modification invariant
dogfoodPatterns.description: scripts/agent-identity-bridge.sh writes persona env to .agentguard/persona.env — kernel blocks as self-modification. Chicken-and-egg: governance requires identity for telemetry, but governance blocks the identity-setting mechanism.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel squad: scope no-governance-self-modification to exclude .agentguard/persona.env (identity artifact, not policy/hook). Invariant should distinguish runtime identity state from governance configuration.
dogfoodPatterns.secondaryIssue: gh issue create also blocked when body references governance paths — invariant should only match file write targets, not command argument text

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as 'unknown' in governance denial telemetry.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Agents should read agentguard version at startup; likely missing --agent-version flag or VERSION file in copilot CLI hooks

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: agentguard policy suggest redirects to cloud silently
dogfoodPatterns.description: policy suggest silently redirects to cloud instead of running locally when no cloud token is present. Blocks onboarding dry runs.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: DX squad: add --local flag or clear fallback message

crossCuttingIssues.title: Swarm Health Alert — P0 (2026-03-28, continuing from #1128)
crossCuttingIssues.description: 85.7% agent worktrees stuck. 12 stuck agents, 3 active. 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers (4× oversubscribed). 18 dead PID files in /tmp/. 2 cron collision groups. Prior issue #1128 (2026-03-27) still unresolved.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human required: git worktree prune in main repo, clean /tmp/ PID files, resolve cron collisions (0 6 * * * and 45 */6 * * *), confirm cron daemon is running

crossCuttingIssues.title: KE-2: ActionContext — stalling, critical path for v3.0
crossCuttingIssues.description: 0/4 checkboxes, no assigned PR, unstarted since 2026-03-25. KE-2 is the #1 blocker for v3.0.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Escalate to kernel-sr for assignment this cycle

crossCuttingIssues.title: 149 orphaned branches
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human batch cleanup via git branch -d or workspace-backlog-steward sprint

escalations.reason: Swarm health #1186: 85.7% stuck rate (15h+), 133 agents vs 32 max_workers. Cron daemon may not be running. Needs: git worktree prune, PID cleanup, cron collision fix, capacity review.

Issue #1182: agent-identity-bridge chicken-and-egg — no-governance-self-modification invariant must be scoped to exclude .agentguard/persona.env writes. Blocks telemetry identity enrichment for all scheduled agents.
KE-2 (#917) stalling — 0/4 checkboxes, no PR, no assignee. Critical path for v3.0. Needs assignment this cycle.
agentguard-cloud pinned at 2.8.0 (4 versions behind 2.8.4). Upgrade PR needed. Risk: missing graceful SQLite fallback (#1168), commit-scope-guard fix (#1160), read-only fail-open (#1114).
PR #1150 (Studio EM report 2026-03-28T03:00) is conflicting. Should be closed — sprint goal was delivered.

sprintStatus.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). Cross-squad coordination: KE-2 unblock, swarm health resolution.
sprintStatus.progress: Docs drift resolved (#1187). Two dogfood issues closed (report_intent #1181, pr-merger policy gap in cloud via #490). KE-2 (#917) remains unstarted — highest risk item for sprint delivery.
blockers: Swarm health P0 (#1186) — human intervention needed, ongoing from #1128
Agent identity bridge (#1182) — scheduled agents cannot enrich telemetry with identity
KE-2 (#917) — stalling, no assignee, v3.0 critical path
